name: Creators Block
description: This block displays a banner with a h3 element, an image to be displayed in the top right corner and some images that lead to youtube videos. It should be split into 3 table rows, the first one containing the title and the image, the second one the videos and the third one a button. In order for the image to be displayed property each video be included in its own table which will contain the following rows:

fields.name: rows
fields.description: Author this block using the row/column table structure documented in the sidekick block page and its examples.

usageNotes: The creator profile picture and its name His usertag The channel’s stats A link to one of his videos The background image for his card
ambiguityNotes: This entry was expanded from the sidekick block docs and local source file path, but the exact authoring table/row structure should still be taken from the documented examples when generating DOCX content.
